subcodes.first_line: O sacred leaf! Give thanks unto God for having caused thee to spring forth from this blessed Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه المقدسه فاشکری الله بما انبتک من هذه الشجرة ‌البمارکة ‌النابتة
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @thankfulness; gratitude
